collapsed_anomalies.description: Anomalies detected by teacher but missed by student

hallucinated_anomalies.description: Normal samples incorrectly flagged as anomalies by student

recommendations: Failure rates within acceptable bounds. Focus on incremental improvements and edge case handling.

collapsed_anomalies.description: Anomalies detected by teacher but missed by student

hallucinated_anomalies.description: Normal samples incorrectly flagged as anomalies by student

recommendations: High anomaly collapse rate (22.9%). Consider: 1) Increasing student capacity, 2) Adjusting distillation alpha to emphasize anomaly scores, 3) Using harder mining for anomaly samples.

Good calibration (100.0%). Confident predictions are usually correct.
student_recommendations: Model may be overconfident. Consider calibration techniques or uncertainty-aware training.

key_findings: Anomaly types that transfer poorly: local_outlier, cluster_boundary. These may require specialized handling during distillation.
Best transferring knowledge: density (79.0% retention). Worst: local_structure (64.2% retention).
High anomaly collapse rate (31.7%). Student frequently misses anomalies the teacher detected.
